title: senecio galpinii
intro: Senecio galpinii, also known as Galpin's ragwort or bush calceolaria, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio galpinii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Senecio galpinii are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in a decoction to treat various ailments.
